question: [File: 'File Name: rosetta/app/config/types.go -> Scope: Medium: A bug in the respective layer 0/1/2 network code that results in unintended smart contract behavior with no concrete funds at direct risk'] [Function: Http.ReadTimeout] Can an unprivileged external user exploit a zero or very large ReadTimeout in the Http struct to perform a slow-read attack, keeping connections open and preventing the Rosetta server from processing legitimate smart contract construction requests?
